summary: Completed frontend testing of Pattern View mode functionality. All core features working correctly including pattern isolation, zoom, and toggle functionality.
passed_tests: Pattern View button appears when Pattern toggle is active and pattern_render_contract exists
Pattern View button shows correct state ('View' vs 'View ON')
Pattern View mode successfully hides structure markers, levels, and indicators
Pattern Zoom centers chart on pattern window (Feb 27 - Mar 15 timeframe)
Pattern boundaries remain visible (blue triangle lines)
Pattern card remains visible during Pattern View mode
Pattern View toggle functionality works correctly (ON/OFF)
Ascending Triangle pattern detected and rendered properly
No JavaScript errors or console errors during testing
